headline: Woman's 'Low Maintenance' Dating Profile Is A Lie, She Has A Spreadsheet For Red Flags
summary: The spreadsheet has 12 tabs, color-coding, and a 'yeah, no' filter. Her therapist has seen it.
fullBody: Jessica LowMaintenance claims she's 'chill' on her dating profile. Her spreadsheet says otherwise. 'I track everything,' Jessica admitted. 'Communication frequency, emoji usage, last text response time.' Her therapist has asked to 'maybe stop.' Jessica added a 'therapy' tab. 'I'm processing,' she said. Her friends have asked to see the spreadsheet. Jessica declined. 'It's private.' Her therapist is concerned.
